title: THE LOUISIANA CAPITAL COMPANIES
doc_html:
CHAPTER 26.  THE LOUISIANA CAPITAL COMPANIES

TAX CREDIT PROGRAM

§1921.  Short title

This Chapter may be cited as the Louisiana Capital Companies Tax Credit Program.  

Added by Acts 1983, No. 642, §1.

CHAPTER 26.  THE LOUISIANA CAPITAL COMPANIES
TAX CREDIT PROGRAM
§1921.  Short title
This Chapter may be cited as the Louisiana Capital Companies Tax Credit Program.
Added by Acts 1983, No. 642, §1.
